title: erigeron uncialis var. uncialis
intro: Erigeron uncialis var. uncialis, also known as Fawn lily or Erigeron, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is known for its daisy-like flowers, which have white petals and yellow centers. The medicinal properties of Erigeron uncialis var. uncialis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing respiratory issues.
